title: RSW Christmas 8 Metre Gift Wrap Pack – 4 x 2M Wrapping Paper Rolls, 2 x 2M Raffia Ribbons & 8 Tags – Woodland, Snowflake & Tree Designs
features: COMPLETE WRAPPING SET – Includes 4 x 2 metre gift wrap rolls, 2 x 2 metre raffia ribbons, and 8 matching tags
WOODLAND & SNOWFLAKE DESIGNS – Includes woodland, snowflake, Christmas tree, and plain wrap styles for a coordinated finish
PLASTIC FREE WRAP – Eco-friendly paper that is easy to cut and fold for neat and professional-looking presents
MATCHING TAGS INCLUDED – Label your gifts with ease using the included gift tags
IDEAL FOR MULTIPLE GIFTS – 8 metres total wrap length, perfect for wrapping all your Christmas presents
description: Make your gifts look beautiful and festive with the RSW 8 Metre Gift Wrap Pack, designed for a coordinated and stylish Christmas. This complete wrapping set includes four 2 metre rolls of gift wrap, two 2 metre lengths of raffia ribbon, and eight matching gift tags, giving you everything you need to wrap multiple presents in one convenient pack. The wrap features four complementary designs: a woodland print with reindeer and foliage, a snowflake pattern, a Christmas tree motif, and a classic plain option for a simple elegant finish. Each roll is made from high-quality, plastic-free paper that is easy to cut and fold, helping you achieve perfectly wrapped gifts every time. The raffia ribbons add a rustic touch, and the included tags make it easy to label each present for friends and family. Perfect for families, parties, or anyone with lots of presents to wrap, this 8 metre set saves you time and keeps your wrapping theme consistent. Whether you prefer traditional or modern décor, this versatile wrap pack will make sure your gifts stand out under the tree.
